appraisal_events.evidence: « on ne tenait plus compte de ses exclusives qu'une fois sur deux … craignant qu'un jour ce fût de lui qu'on se privât, il avait commencé … à baisser … ses prix »; colères « assez fragmentaires » qui s'oublient vite.
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator presents Charlus as having lost social control: his prohibitions are increasingly disregarded and he resigns himself out of fear of being excluded; his brief and volatile angers further undermine his authority.

status_effects.explanation: His power of exclusion appears undermined and he yields ground out of fear of being deprived himself, which locally lowers his social authority.
